quotes.quote: 我就是一个替身，拜托你们不要这么认真。
quotes.context: 乔晚对马怀真吐槽自己的处境
quotes.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait, half body: a young woman in white cultivation robes, delicate features with a hint of mischief in her eyes, long black hair loosely tied, slight smile with shallow dimples, ink wash painting style, warm lighting

quotes.quote: 认命是我的强项，但你们不能一直刷新我的底线。
quotes.context: 面对接连不断的麻烦，乔晚终于忍无可忍
quotes.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait, half body: a young woman with a determined expression, white robes flowing, standing on a misty mountain peak, wind blowing her hair, dramatic lighting, watercolor style

quotes.quote: 当白月光死了，替身就成了新的白月光——这是什么破逻辑？
quotes.context: 乔晚发现自己在门派中的地位变化后哭笑不得
quotes.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait, half body: young woman with exasperated expression, leaning on an ancient tree, cultivation robes slightly disheveled, sunset lighting, traditional Chinese painting style

quotes.quote: 我叫乔晚，晚来的晚，不是替身的替。
quotes.context: 对质疑她身份的人，乔晚第一次正面宣告自己的存在
quotes.image_prompt: Chinese fantasy novel character portrait, half body: a young woman standing tall and proud, white robes immaculate, eyes burning with quiet defiance, misty mountain background, golden hour light, traditional ink wash painting style
